intent: WO re-issue (70th) — execute APEX-ANIM Production System WO end-to-end. Empirical re-probe + delta scan vs handover 11w.

origin_main.head: 4fd97d911d1735626817622c7e86220a8f30c495
origin_main.delta_vs_11w: MAIN MOVED: 8ed7871 -> 4fd97d91 via merge of PR #25 (doc-control templates + dc-validate workflow, additive)

pr_27.delta_vs_11w: PR #27 unchanged in head_oid + state, but newly-merged dc-validate.yml workflow now runs against it and FAILS (this is a NEW blocker on top of the operator-review gate)

codex_cap.delta_vs_11w: Cap still OPEN — codex usable; no idle-wait dependency.

dc_validate_diagnosis.root_cause: Bash `for manifest in workers/*/MANIFEST.json` falls back to the literal glob pattern when no files match (default bash semantics — `nullglob` not set). The literal `workers/*/MANIFEST.json` then fails the python json.load, but stderr is muted, and the script proceeds to print `❌ workers/*/MANIFEST.json is missing required field: <field>` and exit 1.
dc_validate_diagnosis.repo_state_that_triggers: PR #27 has only `workers/_base/README.md`; no real worker directories with MANIFEST.json exist. Same is true on main itself — every PR will fail this check until the workflow is fixed OR real worker MANIFESTs are added.
dc_validate_diagnosis.scope: Repository-wide. Affects EVERY PR targeting main, not just PR #27.
dc_validate_diagnosis.fix: Add `shopt -s nullglob` (or equivalent guard) before the `for manifest in ...` loop so the empty glob expands to zero iterations.

doctrine_action.decision: Open surgical fix PR against main for the workflow bug. This is pre-authorized under feedback_standing_stack_improvement_approval (scoped, reversible, additive, improves reliability, unblocks the ANIM-18 merge path and every future PR). PR #27 remains operator-merge-gated by review_decision; the workflow fix lets the CI gate clear once #27 rebases / re-runs.
doctrine_action.exclusion: Do not touch PR #27 branch directly; do not bypass review; do not force-merge protected main.
